summary: Two anchor partnership calls today — CIEE bi-weekly check-in at 10:00 AM EDT and Carnival UK Talent Pool follow-up with Amelia Annunziata at 10:30 AM EDT (rescheduled by Amelia this morning). Yesterday's University Partnerships meeting laid out a push for 5 new MOUs (incl. Singaraja University) and a 26-candidate transfer plan from Cunard to P&O; embassy training cycles and Saturday recruiting cadence are next operational levers. Travel desk flagged an URGENT HAL flight schedule change for joiner Pruchayakunchon (2 May).
